description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.8.2 Docker image. Define a lint_yaml_files job in the default stage that runs pip install yamllint then lints all *.yml files excluding .kitchen, .molecule and [warning] patterns with find . -type f -name '*.yml' | sed 's|\./||g' | egrep -v '(\.kitchen/|\[warning\]|\.molecule/)' | xargs yamllint -c yamllint.conf -f parsable. Add a pages job also in the default stage that runs only on the master branch, downloads Hugo ${HUGO_VERSION} via curl, extracts it, moves the binary to /usr/local/bin, builds the site with hugo -s website -d ../public, installs mkdocs and plugins with pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin, verifies mkdocs version, runs ./prep_docs_for_publish.sh, builds the documentation with mkdocs build, moves the output to public/docs, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
